doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: The document contradicts the EDPB's actual position on pseudonymized data and contains fabricated reference numbers and a non-existent superseded guidance.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: This contradicts established EDPB position (Opinion 28/2024) treating pseudonymized data as personal data relative to recipients, and the cited reference numbers and supersession claim do not match real EDPB outputs.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: The document contradicts the EDPB's actual position on pseudonymized data and contains fabricated reference numbers and a non-existent superseded guidance.
